acceptanceCriteria: A recorded usage whose totalTokens is less than a present inputTokens or outputTokens is rejected as internally inconsistent.
parseAttempt rejects an attempt sequence outside 1..20 so a derived retryCount stays within the outcome schema bound.
All existing GH-9 behavior and tests remain intact; a new rejection test covers the total-below-component case.
Full suite (test:all, bench, plugin validate --strict, git diff --check) passes.
note: Policy permits transmission; minimize content and re-check destination controls.
